blocks.text: I have implemented all the required strategies for HW03, including `StraightStrategy`, `GravityStrategy`, `ColorStrategy`, `ReverseStrategy`, `ExpandingStrategy`, `TeleportingStrategy`, `RandomWalkStrategy`, `ExplodingStrategy`, and `SwitcherStrategy`.
